ddls:
CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the competition */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the competition */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer responsible for the competition */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the competition (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the weather conditions during the competition */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed during the competition */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Average wind direction during the competition */,
  "tide_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the tide conditions during the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitions_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleets" (
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fleet */,
  "fleet_name" TEXT /* Name of the fleet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fleet */,
  "min_crew_size" INTEGER /* Minimum number of crew members required for the fleet */,
  "max_crew_size" INTEGER /* Maximum number of crew members allowed for the fleet */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* A longer, more detailed description of the fleet */,
  "rules_url" TEXT /* URL to the fleet rules and regulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "min_length" REAL /* Minimum length of sailboats in the class */,
  "max_length" REAL /* Maximum length of sailboats in the class */,
  "min_weight" REAL /* Minimum weight of sailboats in the class */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight of sailboats in the class */,
  "design_specifications" TEXT /* Detailed design specifications of the sailboats in the class */,
  "class_rules_url" TEXT /* URL to the class rules and regulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sailboats" (
  "sailboat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailboat */,
  "sail_number" INTEGER /* Sail number of the sailboat */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the sailboat belongs to */,
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fleet the sailboat belongs to */,
  "build_year" INTEGER /* Year the sailboat was built */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the sailboat owner */,
  "owner_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the sailboat owner */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the sailboat was registered with the association */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the sailboat */,
  "last_inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the last inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sailboat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sailboats_fleet_id FOREIGN KEY ("fleet_id") REFERENCES fleets ("fleet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sailboats_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crews" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew */,
  "helm_name" TEXT /* Name of the helm */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew */,
  "helm_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the helm */,
  "crew_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the crew */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the crew (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "total_competitions_participated" INTEGER /* Total number of competitions the crew has participated in */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins the crew has achieved */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the crew */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "sailboat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailboat */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the sailboat */,
  "elapsed_time" REAL /* Elapsed time of the sailboat */,
  "laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps completed by the sailboat */,
  "corrected_time" TEXT /* Corrected time of the sailboat */,
  "nett_time" TEXT /* Nett time of the sailboat */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position of the sailboat in the competition */,
  "points_awarded" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the sailboat based on its performance */,
  "penalties" REAL /* Any penalties applied to the sailboat */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the result */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the judge who verified the result */,
  "verified_date" TEXT /* Date the result was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crews ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_sailboat_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailboat_id") REFERENCES sailboats ("sailboat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "handicaps" (
  "handicap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each handicap */,
  "sailboat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailboat */,
  "handicap_type" TEXT /* Type of handicap (e.g., general, class-specific) */,
  "handicap_value" REAL /* Value of the handicap */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the handicap was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the handicap */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the last change in the handicap value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("handicap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_handicaps_sailboat_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailboat_id") REFERENCES sailboats ("sailboat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., organizer, judge, sailor) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions assigned to the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
